description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the rikorose/gcc-cmake Docker image and a before_script that runs apt update, installs sudo qttools5-dev and qt5-default, and executes ./.wiringPi.bash. Define two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a cmake_build job that creates a build directory, changes into it, runs cmake .. and then make -j2. In the deploy stage add a cmake_install job that also creates a build directory, runs cmake .., runs make -j2 install, and lists the installed desktop entries with ls $HOME/.local/share/applications. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
